positive: Minimalist geometric representation of a celestial fox spirit, sitting serenely among abstract nebula clouds and stylized mountain peaks. The fox silhouette is sleek and elegant, composed of vibrant cyan and deep indigo gradients. The background features interlocking geometric patterns (sacred geometry style) suggesting constellations and cosmic dust. Strong contrast, clean lines, high symmetry, vaporwave aesthetic mixed with oriental minimalism. Color palette: Teal, deep purple, cyan, and white accents. Perfect for central, repeating apparel pattern. Vector art style, flat illustration, graphic design, high detail, sharp edges, volumetric lighting, cinematic composition.
negative: blur, bokeh, low quality, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, messy, noisy, low contrast, realistic photo, complex background, extra limbs, bad anatomy
